text:
Is this actually a good deal?

That question does not get answered by excitement.
It gets answered by the numbers.

Before you chase the property, check the ARV, rehab, holding costs, and exit strategy.

A good deal should survive the math.

Try the Deal Analyzer before your next walkthrough.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a premium real estate deal-room visual for The Real Estate Deal Lab. Dark navy background, refined gold accents, serious investor education mood, clean editorial composition, subtle document and numbers texture, professional real estate operator energy, trust and clarity. A dark wood strategy desk with a calculator, a clean pro forma sheet, a Florida residential property photo partially visible, and a gold 0-100 scorecard motif. Leave clean lower-left negative space for composited headline type. Avoid luxury flex imagery, mansions as status symbols, Lamborghinis, cash piles, guru seminar energy, fake urgency, cluttered office, cheap clipart, cartoon house icons, garbled text, rendered words, fake logos, random neon colors, sci-fi, music-stream visuals, anime, futuristic culture motifs, and unrelated tech-brand visual motifs.
visual.headline: GOOD DEAL?

text:
Five numbers can save you from a bad offer.

Before you write anything, know the ARV, rehab, holding costs, rent potential, and cash needed.

If one number is a guess, the whole deal is weaker.

Save this before your next walkthrough.

slides.openai_prompt: Create a premium real estate deal-room carousel cover for The Real Estate Deal Lab. slides.headline: 5 NUMBERS FIRST

slides.subtext: WHAT IS IT WORTH AFTER REPAIR?

slides.openai_prompt: Premium dark navy and gold CTA frame for The Real Estate Deal Lab. Deal Analyzer scorecard motif, calculator, property sheet, private deal-room feel. No rendered text.
slides.headline: TRY THE ANALYZER

text:
The Lab is where deals get pressure-tested.

Bring the numbers.
Bring the questions.
Bring the property you are not sure about yet.

You do not need more hype.
You need a room where the deal can be worked through clearly.

Join the Lab.

text:

ARV
Rehab
Rent

Use the Deal Analyzer before you make the offer.
